meta.note: Curated index of authored projects. External clones filtered out.

projects.name: Claude_Hackathon
projects.summary: AI-powered telehealth platform for underserved populations using Claude. Features voice/web intake, self-evolving medical knowledge graph, case triage, and a doctor dashboard.

projects.name: ML_Project_M_Spring26
projects.summary: ResumeForge — a local-first, explainable resume tailoring system. Uses Ollama LLMs, LaTeX compilation, PDF generation, SSE streaming, Overleaf sync, and optional Redis/Celery async pipeline.

projects.name: DeskFlow Native
projects.summary: Cross-platform (macOS + Windows) desktop workflow manager. Creates named workflow profiles with non-destructive shortcuts to existing folders and a desktop reconciliation engine.

projects.name: Clap_OpsPilot
projects.summary: Agentic operations automation platform (OpsPilot). Contains training samples for agentic workflow tasks and lean operational decks.

projects.name: pradyotbathuri-website
projects.summary: Personal professional portfolio website built with Next.js, migrated from Wix.

projects.name: Quantitative-Modeling_Practice
projects.summary: Quantitative finance modeling exercises including binomial option pricing models.

projects.name: BOOK:LLM?
projects.summary: Working project for a book on LLMs. Contains structured chapters, Jupyter notebooks, and academic paper references on prompt engineering, LLM internals, and applications.

projects.name: NCAA
projects.summary: Data analysis and modeling project around NCAA sports, likely for sports analytics or prediction.
